about.title: Our Story
about.p1: Café Lumière was born from a simple belief: that a perfect cup of coffee can transform an ordinary moment into something extraordinary. Founded in 2020 in the heart of the city, our café has become a sanctuary for those who appreciate the finer things — expertly crafted beverages, freshly baked pastries, and an atmosphere that feels like home.
about.pullQuote: "We believe in bringing light to your day — one perfect cup at a time."
about.p2: Our name, 'Lumière' — French for 'light' — reflects our philosophy. Whether through a carefully prepared espresso at dawn or a leisurely afternoon tea, every visit is designed to be a moment of calm and connection.
about.p3: We source our beans from sustainable farms across three continents, roasting them in small batches to ensure peak flavor. Our pastry chef crafts each item fresh daily, using locally sourced ingredients wherever possible.
about.value1Desc: We source only the finest single-origin beans and seasonal produce, ensuring every ingredient meets our uncompromising standards.
about.value2Desc: Each beverage and pastry is prepared by hand with precision and care. We take pride in the craft behind every cup and plate.
about.value3Desc: Our team is trained not just in technique but in creating genuine connections — because great coffee is even better with great company.
about.team1Bio: World Barista Championship finalist with 12 years of specialty coffee experience across Milan, Tokyo, and New York.
about.team2Bio: Trained at Le Cordon Bleu Paris, Pierre brings French precision to every croissant, tart, and seasonal creation.
about.team3Bio: With a background in hospitality management and a passion for people, Lucas ensures every guest feels genuinely welcome.
